customer_description: There's a grinding noise when I press the brakes, especially at low speed. It started about a week ago and seems to be getting worse.
resolution: Front brake pads worn to metal. Replaced front brake pads and resurfaced discs on both sides.

customer_description: My car won't start in the morning. I hear a clicking sound when I turn the key but the engine doesn't turn over.
resolution: Battery load test failed. Battery replaced and charging system checked — alternator output within spec.

customer_description: The temperature gauge is going into the red and I can see steam coming from under the bonnet. I pulled over immediately.
resolution: Coolant leak identified at lower radiator hose. Hose replaced, system flushed and refilled with fresh coolant.

customer_description: There's a yellow warning light shaped like an engine on my dashboard. The car seems to be running fine but the light has been on for three days.
resolution: Fault code P0171 — system too lean bank 1. Mass airflow sensor cleaned and intake air leak at vacuum hose repaired.

customer_description: The car is pulling to the left when I drive on a straight road. I have to hold the steering wheel to one side to keep it straight.
resolution: Four-wheel alignment measured and corrected. Front left tyre found underinflated at 18 PSI — inflated to 32 PSI.

customer_description: I can smell something burning when I stop after a long drive. It's a bit like hot plastic or rubber.
resolution: Rear brake caliper seized on driver side causing pad to drag on disc. Caliper replaced and brake fluid flushed.

customer_description: My air conditioning stopped blowing cold air. It just blows normal temperature air now even when set to the coldest setting.
resolution: AC system pressure test showed low refrigerant. UV dye test identified leak at condenser. Condenser replaced and system recharged with R134a.

customer_description: There's a loud rattling noise from underneath the car when I go over bumps. It sounds like something is loose.
resolution: Front anti-roll bar drop links worn — excessive play found on both sides. Both drop links replaced.

customer_description: The car jerks and stutters when I accelerate from a standstill. It feels like the engine is misfiring.
resolution: Fault codes P0301, P0303 — misfire on cylinders 1 and 3. Spark plugs and ignition coils replaced on all four cylinders.

customer_description: There's a knocking sound from the engine, especially when I first start it in the morning. It goes away after a minute or two.
resolution: Oil pressure low due to worn oil pump. Oil pump replaced and full synthetic oil and filter changed.
